response.justification: Well over the required six years of fullstack experience with a stack that closely matches the role — TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes — plus current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work, which is an explicitly required and rare skill. Strong testing culture (TDD, test-framework authorship, workshops) and demonstrated architecture ownership. Gaps are mostly secondary: no stated Nest.js, Kotlin, or Python experience, and much of the deep systems work is in D rather than the listed languages.
strengths: Extensive fullstack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience at product companies
Current AI-agent and MCP development experience, directly matching a required skill
Strong engineering craft: TDD, CI/CD, testing expertise, cloud and container deployment
concerns: Kotlin and Python absent from skills; Java experience appears dated
Testing framework expertise shown mostly in D-language tooling rather than Vitest/Playwright
